bio: Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi was the last Shah of Iran, ruling from 1941 until his overthrow in the [1979 revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). His secret police, [SAVAK](/orgs/savak), suppressed political opposition including the [National Front](/orgs/national-front-iran), the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran), and leftist groups. He was restored to power after the 1953 coup that overthrew Prime Minister [Mohammad Mossadegh](/people/mohammad-mossadegh). He fled Iran on 16 January 1979 and died in exile in Cairo on 27 July 1980. Father of [Reza Pahlavi](/people/reza-pahlavi).
editorial_notes: Born 26 Oct 1919. Shah 1941-1979. Fled 16 Jan 1979. Died 27 Jul 1980 Cairo.
